task_completion.description: Load the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is visible in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.
A Chord Diagram is visible on the main canvas, or the visualization type is set to 'Chord Diagram' in the visualization type selector.

task_completion.description: Assign 'Customer Segment' as Source, 'Product Category' as Target, and 'Sales' as the measure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Grammar panel, 'Customer Segment' is placed in the Source/Category zone, 'Product Category' is placed in the Target/Category zone, and 'Sales' is placed in the Values/Measure zone.

task_completion.description: Set the visualization title to 'Segment-Category Sales Flow'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title above the Chord Diagram on the canvas reads exactly 'Segment-Category Sales Flow'.
The top application bar or the active tab displays 'Market_Chord_Analysis', indicating the workbook has been saved with the correct name.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Oracle Analytics Desktop application open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The visualization is genuinely generated by Oracle Analytics Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Chord Diagram appears within the standard Oracle Analytics canvas with appropriate UI elements (like the grammar panel, data panel, and visualization toolbar) rather than being an imported image.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file through the application rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog or application title bar shows the file name, confirming it was saved from within Oracle Analytics Desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: 'Market_Chord_Analysis.dva'. Visualization type: 'chord'. Required columns: 'Customer Segment', 'Product Category', 'Sales'. Expected title: 'Segment-Category Sales Flow'. Save directory: 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.
